text.title: Social Proof Harvest Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the automated detection workflow running AND a single quote-DB chosen?

branch.question: Was a new mention captured this week AND consent granted?

branch.conclusion: Publish quote to wall + chosen surfaces; mark single source-of-truth.
Hold publish; either no new mention or consent pending. Do not paraphrase to fill.
Skip publish; set up detection workflow + pick DB schema first.

text.example: detection=brand24 db=notion mention=tweet/1234 consent=DM-yes-2026-05-18 → publish per r3.
